allow: Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import { mkdtemp, mkdir, writeFile, readFile } from 'node:fs/promises'; import { tmpdir } from 'node:os'; import { join } from 'node:path'; import { runCloak } from '/Users/truongezgg/Works/Me/tools/cloak/dist/app/runCloak.js'; const root = await mkdtemp\(join\(tmpdir\(\), 'cloak-smoke-'\)\); const configDir = join\(root, 'config'\); const workDir = join\(root, 'work'\); await mkdir\(workDir, { recursive: true }\); const target = join\(workDir, 'note.txt'\); const original = 'hello from smoke test'; await writeFile\(target, original, 'utf8'\); const messages1 = []; const prompts1 = { askNewPassword: async \(\) => 'p@ssw0rd', askConfirmPassword: async \(\) => 'p@ssw0rd', askPassword: async \(\) => { throw new Error\('askPassword should not be called on first run'\); }, selectFile: async \(\) => target, confirmAction: async \(action\) => { if \(action !== 'encode'\) throw new Error\('expected encode action on first run'\); return true; }, showMessage: async \(m\) => { messages1.push\(m\); } }; await runCloak\({ cwd: workDir, configDir, prompts: prompts1 }\); const encoded = await readFile\(target, 'utf8'\); if \(encoded === original\) throw new Error\('encode smoke failed: file content unchanged'\); if \(!messages1.includes\('File encoded successfully'\)\) throw new Error\('encode smoke failed: success message missing'\); const messages2 = []; const prompts2 = { askNewPassword: async \(\) => { throw new Error\('askNewPassword should not be called on second run'\); }, askConfirmPassword: async \(\) => { throw new Error\('askConfirmPassword should not be called on second run'\); }, askPassword: async \(\) => 'p@ssw0rd', selectFile: async \(\) => target, confirmAction: async \(action\) => { if \(action !== 'decode'\) throw new Error\('expected decode action on second run'\); return true; }, showMessage: async \(m\) => { messages2.push\(m\); } }; await runCloak\({ cwd: workDir, configDir, prompts: prompts2 }\); const decoded = await readFile\(target, 'utf8'\); if \(decoded !== original\) throw new Error\('decode smoke failed: did not restore original content'\); if \(!messages2.includes\('File decoded successfully'\)\) throw new Error\('decode smoke failed: success message missing'\); console.log\('SMOKE_OK root=' + root\);")

}, selectFile: async \(\) => target, confirmAction: async \(action\) => { if \(action === 'encode'\) { return true; } throw new Error\('expected encode action on first run'\); }, showMessage: async \(m\) => { messages1.push\(m\); console.log\('SMOKE_OK root=' + root\);")
